scenarios.name: Filter and search services
scenarios.evidence: Search filters by name/role/owner/stack, status filter by getServiceStatus()

scenarios.name: Browse artifact file tree
scenarios.evidence: FileTree recursive rendering, ArtifactPreview with Markdown/Raw/Token views

scenarios.name: Layer completion action
scenarios.evidence: ServiceDetailModal with LayerConfirmDialog, Complete button for missing layers

scenarios.name: Empty service list
scenarios.evidence: isEmpty state hides filters, shows empty message with edith_scan hint

scenarios.name: Artifact file not found
scenarios.evidence: contentError state shows warning message in preview area
